ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., Marathon, Half-Marathon, 10k) */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "race_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Current status of the race (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "race_url" TEXT /* URL for the race's official webpage */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race, including course information, rules, and any special instructions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., individual, relay team member) */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the relay team, if applicable */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the relay team (e.g., runner 1, runner 2) */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions of the participant */,
  "shirt_size" TEXT /* T-shirt size for race day */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_participants" (
  "race_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race participant */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Bib number assigned to the participant */,
  "chip_number" TEXT /* Chip number assigned to the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "bib_collection_status" TEXT /* Status of bib collection (e.g., not collected, collected) */,
  "chip_collection_status" TEXT /* Status of chip collection (e.g., not collected, collected) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status for the race registration (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkpoints" (
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkpoint */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "checkpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the checkpoint */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance of the checkpoint from the start line (in kilometers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the checkpoint */,
  "checkpoint_type" TEXT /* Type of checkpoint (e.g., water station, rest area, medical station) */,
  "checkpoint_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the checkpoint */,
  "checkpoint_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the checkpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkpoints_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the participant */,
  "gun_start_time" TEXT /* Gun start time of the participant */,
  "chip_start_time" TEXT /* Chip start time of the participant */,
  "chip_finish_time" TEXT /* Chip finish time of the participant */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "net_time" TEXT /* Net time of the participant (chip finish time - chip start time) */,
  "overall_ranking" INTEGER /* Overall ranking of the participant in the race */,
  "category_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the participant in their category */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Average pace of the participant (minutes per kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkpoint_times" (
  "checkpoint_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkpoint time */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race result */,
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the checkpoint */,
  "checkpoint_time" TEXT /* Time the participant reached the checkpoint */,
  "split_time" TEXT /* Time taken between the previous checkpoint and the current checkpoint */,
  "split_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the participant at the checkpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkpoint_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkpoint_times_checkpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("checkpoint_id") REFERENCES checkpoints ("checkpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkpoint_times_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "race_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "race_type_distance_km" REAL /* Distance of the race type in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the category (e.g., male, female) */,
  "category_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the category (e.g., 18-29, 30-39) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories_participants" (
  "category_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category participant */,
  "race_participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race participant */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_categories_participants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES race_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_categories_participants_race_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_participant_id") REFERENCES race_participants ("race_participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organizer */,
  "organizer_website" TEXT /* URL of the organizer's official website */,
  "organizer_description" TEXT /* Description of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_organizers_races" (
  "organizer_race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer-race link */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_organizers_races_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_organizers_races_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES race_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the sponsor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's official website */,
  "sponsor_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_sponsors_races" (
  "sponsor_race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor-race link */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_sponsors_races_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_sponsors_races_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES race_sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer (e.g., water station, security, medical) */,
  "volunteer_status" TEXT /* Status of the volunteer (e.g., confirmed, pending, no-show) */,
  "volunteer_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_volunteers_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., race official, event organizer, participant) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
